hero.title: We built Pawmie so pets get the same care as family.
hero.subtitle: Pawmie is a friendly pet‑care companion that helps busy pet parents book vet visits, grooming, and training in just a few taps.

values.title: Pet‑first design
values.description: Every screen, flow, and reminder is designed to reduce stress for pets and humans.

values.title: Simple for busy humans
values.description: From quick booking to clear reminders, we focus on what you actually need day‑to‑day.

values.title: Built for growth
values.description: This demo is ready to plug into real vet partners, groomers, and trainers as your project grows.

story.heading: The story behind Pawmie
paragraphs: Pawmie started as a simple idea: pet care should feel as friendly and organised as caring for any other member of the family. Many pet parents juggle work, family, and health appointments — we wanted to make at least one part of that easier.

This demo project focuses on the core journey: discovering services, booking appointments, and keeping track of upcoming visits. The goal is to give you a clean, modern foundation that you can easily connect to real APIs, databases, or admin dashboards later.

Everything you see here — from bookings to marketplace items — is powered by structured dummy data. That makes it safe to experiment with UI, layouts, and new ideas without worrying about real user information.

team.name: Paws & Pixels Studio
team.bio: Imaginary product team focused on making pet care tools delightful and easy to use.

team.name: Happy Tails Lab
team.bio: Helps validate flows and features with real pet parents before they reach production.
